summary: Iter26 — validated 4 deliverables on Altiaro. (1) Mobile Sticky ATC: classes backdrop-blur-xl + pb-[calc(0.75rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] present, CTA h-12 min-h-[48px], cart drawer opens on tap. (2) Cmd+K Concepteur (CommandMenu) + site-context steps all working. (3) Admin palette (old CommandPalette) still opens for role=admin — no regression, new CommandMenu not shown. (4) Page Builder homepage-sections: 16 section rows, 4 presets, toggle icons, save button, subtab-sections loaded by default. Backend: homepage-sections GET/POST preset, PATCH section/hero, generate-section-image all 2xx or proper 4xx.

minor.issue: Returns 400 'Section invalide (0--1)' when product has no narrative.sections — expected behavior, but could be clearer (e.g., 422 with 'narrative not generated yet'). Not blocking.

action_items: (Optional) The test product 447e666d-5db0-4e73-9e94-949a30db9cfd does NOT currently have narrative.sections generated (main agent said it did). Generate narrative first (POST /api/products/{id}/generate-narrative or equivalent) before exercising NarrativeSectionsEditor + generate-section-image flow in UI.
Pre-existing minor: React warning `Invalid DOM property fetchpriority` still in console (should be fetchPriority). Not caused by this iteration.
Pre-existing: `cdn.tailwindcss.com should not be used in production` warning from some storefront page.
critical_code_review_comments: CommandMenu.jsx (252 lines) is well-structured but `setOpen` handlers on Command.Item rows could be centralized via a single Row factory to remove repetition. Minor.

CommandMenu.jsx lazy-loads sites only once (sites.length === 0 guard). If user creates a new site while the session is alive, the palette will show stale data until refresh. Consider invalidating cache on route change or exposing a refresh action.
HomepageSectionsEditor: confirm() is a blocking native dialog — replace with shadcn AlertDialog for accessibility + consistency with the rest of the app.

MobileStickyBuy.jsx adds a scroll listener w/ `{passive:true}` ✓ but re-renders on every scroll tick because setVisible is called unconditionally. Guard with `setVisible(v => (v !== newV ? newV : v))` or compare first to reduce reflows on long pages.

Storefront renderHomepageSections + hasData(): ensure hasData() returns false for press_logos/instagram when arrays are empty `[]` and not just `undefined` — curl validated preset 'editorial' renders 11 visible but worth unit-testing hasData explicitly.
seed_data_creation: Applied homepage-sections preset minimal during test, then restored to editorial (11 visible) so main agent can continue with same fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IMPORTANT: Playwright `page.keyboard.press('Meta+K')` does NOT trigger the Cmd+K handler in this env — use `Control+K` via keyboard.down/press/up sequence, which matches the `ctrlKey` branch in CommandMenu.jsx. Mobile sticky buy requires viewport 390x844 AND scrollY>600 — both enforced by the component. Storefront sections on site 65964cb0-...: `editorial` preset restored (11 visible). The test product 447e666d does NOT have narrative.sections yet — UI narrative-sections-editor won't appear until narrative generated. Admin Cmd+K still uses old CommandPalette (role-gated in Layout.jsx) — regression confirmed.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found. All 4 new deliverables pass functional testing.
